name: Peter's Sweet Curry Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Ketjap Benteng Soy Sauce OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork with herbal salt.
2. Broil or fry the pork until it is tender.
3. Arrange the pork in a casserole dish, adding bananas or peach halves.
4. If using peach halves, add the syrup as well.
5. In a frying pan, heat the curry slightly in olive oil.
6. Add sour cream and soy sauce, stirring to combine.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium flame.
8. Simmer for 5 minutes.
9. Pour the sauce over the pork and bananas in the casserole dish.
10. Cook in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until done.
11. Serve with white or brown rice.
